steps.title: Use the reciprocal shortcut
steps.content:
The given equation is $\frac{x}{6}=4$. Taking reciprocals switches both sides, so
$$\frac{6}{x}=\frac{1}{4}$$
This works because $x$ is not $0$; in fact, the equation implies $x=24$.

steps.title: Confirm by substitution
steps.content:
If you solve first, $x=6\cdot4=24$. Then
$$\frac{6}{x}=\frac{6}{24}=\frac{1}{4}=0.25$$
Therefore acceptable entries include 1/4 or 0.25.
